metadata.description: Personal collection of agent skills. Code review, productivity, security, and more. Model agnostic.

plugins.name: ts-review
plugins.description: Opinionated TypeScript / JavaScript code review skills. Auto-detects stack (Next.js, React, Drizzle, next-safe-action, Zod, Tailwind, Vitest, etc.) and applies only rules for tools in use. Three variants: full single-agent (/ts-review), lite single-pass (/ts-review-lite, ~80 model turns), and 6-parallel-subagent (/ts-review-multi-agent, incl. a clean-code lens agent). Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: java-review
plugins.description: Opinionated Java code review skills (Spring Boot-focused). Auto-detects stack (Spring Boot starters, JPA, Lombok, Vavr, Resilience4j, Spock, RabbitMQ, etc.) and applies only rules for tools in use. Single-agent (/java-review) and 6-parallel-subagent (/java-review-multi-agent, incl. a clean-code lens agent) variants. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: clean-code
plugins.description: Language-agnostic clean-code standards for any TypeScript / JavaScript project. Enforces declarative/functional style, early returns, DRY de-duplication across files (near-identical siblings, structural repetition), readonly immutability types, intention-revealing names, SOLID, and deliberate error handling. Includes a severity rubric (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) for review. Auto-triggers while writing, refactoring, or reviewing code.

plugins.name: dependabot-review
plugins.description: Review one or more open Dependabot PRs for security and breaking-change impact. Returns per-PR risk verdict and suggested merge order. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: dependabot-batch-updates-pr
plugins.description: Triage and batch-process Dependabot updates on a GitHub repo: open Dependabot PRs plus vulnerability alerts that have no PR. Severity-filtered (default high+critical, prompt for medium+low). Cherry-picks open PRs as clean linear commits on a dedicated branch. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: supply-chain-scan
plugins.description: Scan project dependencies (incl. transitive) for supply-chain risks: typosquats, suspicious postinstalls, recent ownership changes, known IOCs. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Enforce documentation conventions: README structure, heading hierarchy, code-block language tags, link health, ADR format, changelog discipline. Auto-triggers on doc edits.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: General non-code productivity: drafting, summarizing, triaging, planning. Auto-triggers when relevant.

plugins.name: spade-it
plugins.description: Facilitate a full S.P.A.D.E. decision session (Setting, People, Alternatives, Decide, Explain). Interactive, one phase at a time, for hard contested decisions where ownership and follow-through matter. Pushes on vague answers and produces a complete SPADE document. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: optimize-agent-md
plugins.description: Audit and split a monolithic CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md (or GEMINI.md) into a router + small per-subject files. Detects stale or copy-pasted rules that do not match the current repo and drops them before splitting. In Claude Code the user chooses per subject: rule file (.claude/rules/) or auto-discoverable skill (.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md), mixable. Rewrites the root file as an on-demand router. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: promote-rules-to-skills
plugins.description: Promote project rule files (.claude/rules/*.md) into auto-discoverable Claude Code skills (.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md). Hybrid pattern for always-on disciplines, drops redundant rules, migrates dormant flat skill files, verifies live discovery, rewires the root router. Claude Code only. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: ux-audit
plugins.description: Systemic UX/UI audit for Next.js apps. ux-site-mapper maps route structure (app/ + pages/ router, layouts, flows, link graph, optional Chrome screenshots) then hands off to ux-ui-auditor, which scores findings against a bundled 7-category principles reference with High/Medium/Low/Info severity. Auto-triggers when relevant.
